title: Ingest one alert source into canonical event records

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
As an operator, I want Caducus to ingest alerts from a configured alert source into canonical event records, so that operational incidents from alerting systems appear in the same radar as logs and DLQ failures.

Feature: Alert source ingestion
  Scenario: Collect alerts from a configured source
    Given a Caducus configuration that enables an alert collector
    And the collector is configured for a supported alert source
    When I run the Caducus collect command
    Then Caducus reads new alerts from that source
    And Caducus writes one canonical event record per alert
    And the event records include canonical fields plus generalized metadata
